mapper.select: SELECT * FROM notification_setting WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO notification_setting ( user_id, article_publish_notification, article_like_notification, article_collection_notification, article_comment_notification, comment_reply_notification, comment_like_notification, follow_notification, message_notification, report_notification, feedback_notification, system_notification, email_notification, site_notification, create_time, update_time, deleted ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{articlePublishNotification}, #{articleLikeNotification}, #{articleCollectionNotification}, #{articleCommentNotification}, #{commentReplyNotification}, #{commentLikeNotification}, #{followNotification}, #{messageNotification}, #{reportNotification}, #{feedbackNotification}, #{systemNotification}, #{emailNotification}, #{siteNotification}, NOW(), NOW(), 0 )
mapper.update: UPDATE notification_setting SET article_publish_notification = #{articlePublishNotification}, article_like_notification = #{articleLikeNotification}, article_collection_notification = #{articleCollectionNotification}, article_comment_notification = #{articleCommentNotification}, comment_reply_notification = #{commentReplyNotification}, comment_like_notification = #{commentLikeNotification}, follow_notification = #{followNotification}, message_notification = #{messageNotification}, report_notification = #{reportNotification}, feedback_notification = #{feedbackNotification}, system_notification = #{systemNotification}, email_notification = #{emailNotification}, site_notification = #{siteNotification}, update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted = 0
mapper.delete: UPDATE notification_setting SET deleted = 1, deleted_time = NOW(), update_time = NOW() WHERE user_id = #{userId}
